core_mechanism: Noether-charge construction: associating a conserved/monotone charge with a continuous symmetry generated by a vector field via Noether's theorem, then proving that charge's density is monotone (non-decreasing) locally at each instant rather than only globally
brief_reason: The abstract identifies the quantity of interest as 'the Noether charge associated with' a uniquely specified symmetry generator (a null vector) and proves its charge density satisfies a monotonicity (second) law strictly at each instant in time.
